heading: Uniform rules of evidence requirement
label: 1753 Uniform rules of evidence requirement
text: The rules of evidence required to prove that State or local authorities are practicing racial discrimination in assigning students to public schools shall be uniform throughout the United States.
notes: Effective DateSection effective on and after sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 21, 1974section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380section 1221–1 of this title
